phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish market is
phrases.text_local: Où est le marché au poisson ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh mar-SHAY oh pwah-SON
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh fish can be purchased at the port when boats return in the early morning.

responses.english: On the quay, early morning when the boats come in.
responses.phonetic: soor luh KAY, toh luh mah-TAN kahn lay bah-TOH ah-REEV
responses.local: Sur le quai, tôt le matin quand les bateaux arrivent.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy fresh fish
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter du poisson frais ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh ah-sheh-TAY duh pwah-SON FREH
phrases.cultural_note: The fish market (marché au poisson) is open in the early morning when the boats return. The best selection is around 7-8am.

responses.english: Directly on the quay, in the morning around 7am.
responses.phonetic: dee-rek-tuh-MAHN soor luh KAY, luh mah-TAN vair set UHR
responses.local: Directement sur le quai, le matin vers sept heures.

phrases.text_local: Quelle est la pêche du jour ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah PESH doo ZHOOR
phrases.cultural_note: Local catches include anchovies (anchois), tuna (thon), sardines (sardines), and the famous Bayonne hake (colin).

responses.english: Ask the fishermen on the quay what they have today.
responses.phonetic: duh-mahn-DAY oh peh-SHUHR soor luh KAY suh keel on oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.local: Demandez aux pêcheurs sur le quai ce qu'ils ont aujourd'hui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the restaurants along the port
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des restaurants au bord du port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day res-to-RAN oh BOR doo POR
phrases.cultural_note: Several excellent seafood restaurants line the port, serving fresh grilled fish, shellfish platters, and traditional Basque dishes.

responses.english: Yes, there are several along the port.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn ah plu-ZYUHR luh lohn doo POR
responses.local: Oui, il y en a plusieurs le long du port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about boat trips from the port
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des excursions en bateau depuis le port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day eks-koor-SYON an boh-TOH duh-PWEE luh POR
phrases.cultural_note: Boat trips including whale watching and coastal cruises depart from the port. Book at the tourist office or directly at the quay.

responses.english: Yes, check at the tourist office or on the quay.
responses.phonetic: wee, rahn-say-nyay-VOO oh boo-ROH duh too-REESM oo soor luh KAY
responses.local: Oui, renseignez-vous au bureau de tourisme ou sur le quai.
